top_signals.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Waiting for AI to lift the whole market
top_signals.summary: China's economy sees a lift from artificial intelligence-related industries, while real estate and domestic demand remain lackluster.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: General Atomics awarded U.S. Army contract for extended-range artillery
top_signals.summary: During a test last year, the company's projectile hit targets more than 74 miles away after being fired from an M777 howitzer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Changes to collateral eligibility in the Sterling Monetary Framework - Market Notice 11 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice covers changes to the Bank’s collateral eligibility framework for the Sterling Monetary Framework (SMF).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump crypto company's USD1 stablecoins backing UFC event bonuses
top_signals.summary: A spokesperson for the Democratic National Committee decried the move as “an opportunity to use the power of the presidency to make [Trump] and his family even richer.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: These Bitcoin charts show how BTC price could hit $100K before October
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin’s double-bottom setup, weekly RSI divergence and whale flows put traders on alert as BTC tests a key breakout zone.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: JR Tokai to run Disney shinkansen starting Friday
top_signals.summary: The Sparkling Dreams Shinkansen train will make up to two round trips a day mainly for Hikari and Kodama services between Tokyo Station and Shin-Osaka Station until mid-March 2027.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
